ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code_a3" TEXT /* Three-letter country code */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "development_group" TEXT /* Development group the country belongs to */,
  "country_type" TEXT /* Type of country (Developed, Developing) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the country belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's geographic center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's geographic center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code_a3")
)

CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the gas (e.g., GWP_100_CH4) */,
  "gwp_factor" REAL /* Global warming potential factor for the substance */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula for the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_system_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food system stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., LULUC, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "stage_type" TEXT /* Type of stage (e.g., agricultural, consumption) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "country_code_a3" TEXT /* Reference to the country */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substance */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food system stage */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Emission value for the year */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the emission value */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the emission value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_country_code_a3 FOREIGN KEY ("country_code_a3") REFERENCES countries ("country_code_a3"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES food_system_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., Developed, Developing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gwp_factors" (
  "gwp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GWP record */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the substance */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GWP value */,
  "gwp_value" REAL /* GWP value for the substance in that year */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GWP value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gwp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gwp_factors_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "food_system_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_code_a3" TEXT /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the total emissions value */,
  "total_emissions" REAL /* Total emissions for all substances in that year */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector associated with the data (e.g., agriculture, energy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_food_system_data_country_code_a3 FOREIGN KEY ("country_code_a3") REFERENCES countries ("country_code_a3")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES food_system_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the user is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES food_system_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the version revision */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES food_system_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data provider */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the data provider is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)
